title: Plasticware
description: Break-resistant, chemical-compatible plastic labware for measuring, storage, and disposable applications in modern laboratories.

subcategories.name: Graduated Plasticwares
subcategories.description: Measuring cylinders, beakers, and jugs in polypropylene and PMP for routine volumetric measurements where glass breakage is a concern.

subcategories.name: Wash Bottles & Storage
subcategories.description: Solvent-resistant squeeze bottles and chemical storage containers in LDPE and HDPE for safe dispensing of common lab solvents.

subcategories.name: Plastic Funnels & Scoops
subcategories.description: Lightweight, break-resistant polypropylene funnels and measuring scoops for powder handling and liquid transfer.

subcategories.name: Disposable Consumable Plasticwares
subcategories.description: Single-use petri dishes, centrifuge tubes, pipette tips, and sample cups for sterile applications and high-throughput workflows.

subcategories.name: Racks & Organization
subcategories.description: Test tube racks, drying racks, and storage systems in polycarbonate and polypropylene for laboratory bench organization.
